name: MRVL - Marvel's The Defenders (2017) (US)
plot: Daredevil, Jessica Jones, Luke Cage and Iron Fist join forces to take on common enemies as a sinister conspiracy threatens New York City.
cast: Charlie Cox, Krysten Ritter, Mike Colter, Finn Jones, Élodie Yung

name: MRVL - Daredevil: Born Again (2025) (US)
plot: Matt Murdock, a blind lawyer with heightened abilities, is fighting for justice through his bustling law firm, while former mob boss Wilson Fisk pursues his own political endeavors in New York. When their past identities begin to emerge, both men find themselves on an inevitable collision course.
cast: Charlie Cox, Vincent D'Onofrio, Wilson Bethel, Deborah Ann Woll, Margarita Levieva, Matthew Lillard, Lili Taylor, Tony Dalton
director: Dario Scardapane, Chris Ord, Matt Corman

name: MRVL - Wonder Man (2026) (US)
plot: Simon and Trevor, two actors at opposite ends of their careers, chase life-changing roles.
cast: Yahya Abdul-Mateen II, Arian Moayed, X Mayo, Ben Kingsley

name: MRVL - Ironheart (2025) (US)
plot: After the events of Black Panther: Wakanda Forever, technology is pitted against magic when Riri Williams, a young, genius inventor determined to make her mark on the world, returns to her hometown of Chicago. Her unique take on building iron suits is brilliant, but in pursuit of her ambitions, she finds herself wrapped up with the mysterious yet charming Parker Robbins aka "The Hood."
cast: Dominique Thorne, Anthony Ramos, Lyric Ross, Alden Ehrenreich, Regan Aliyah, Manny Montana, Matthew Elam, Anji White
